rationale: For Portugal, the US-Iran deal's continued confirmation and falling oil prices remain the most relevant development, offering indirect relief on energy and cost of living. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Confirmed US-Iran peace understanding continues to push oil prices lower, indirectly benefiting Portugal's energy-import-dependent economy and household costs.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A major UK-Japan investment deal signals shifting trade alliances post-Brexit; limited direct impact on Portugal but relevant to EU trade dynamics.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain (Cártama) is geographically close to Portugal's tourism sector but is a minor local incident with no broader impact.
